overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit urban plaza. The player ascends from a graffiti-covered stairwell into an open pedestrian area with illuminated cherry blossom trees, digital billboards, and street vendors, capturing the game's distinctive cyberpunk aesthetic with heavy use of purple and pink neon lighting.

events.description: approaches the exit of the stairwell, transitioning from indoor to outdoor space

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs in a narrow, graffiti-covered stairwell with red and purple lighting

notable_agents.action: security guard in light blue uniform descending the stairs

entered.detail: steep concrete stairs with metal edges illuminated by red neon lighting
concrete wall covered in colorful spray paint and tags
littered papers and debris on the stairwell floor

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow, enclosed stairwell with steep concrete steps and graffiti-covered walls illuminated by red and purple neon lights. The player ascends the stairs while a security guard descends in the opposite direction, approaching the exit at the top of the stairwell.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit urban plaza with digital billboards

events.description: exits the stairwell into the open urban plaza with neon lighting
begins crossing the pedestrian plaza toward the illuminated tree

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza admiring the neon-lit cherry blossom tree and surrounding architecture

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red shirt walking across the plaza

entered.detail: large artificial tree with pink and white illuminated blossoms hanging overhead
tall vertical screen displaying colorful advertisements and graphics
multi-story structure with glass facades and neon accents
wide open paved area with striped crosswalk markings

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairwell, the scene opens into a vast neon-lit urban plaza at night. A massive illuminated cherry blossom tree dominates the center while digital billboards glow against the dark sky. The player walks across the paved plaza scattered with pedestrians, moving toward a distant clothing vendor stall.

events.description: turns slightly left toward the clothing vendor stall

agents.ego_description: crossing the pedestrian plaza toward the clothing vendor while passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: vendor standing near the clothing stall under the tree

entered.detail: covered market stall with clothing racks and illuminated signage

segments.scene_description: Continuing across the plaza, the player approaches a street vendor stall situated near the illuminated tree. The neon cherry blossom tree now appears to the right as the camera moves past it, revealing more of the surrounding commercial buildings and the vendor's setup ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered clothing vendor stall with merchandise displays

events.description: passes under the vendor stall awning temporarily obscuring the sky view

agents.ego_description: walking past the clothing vendor examining the merchandise and mannequins on display

notable_agents.action: vendor with green hair arranging clothes on the rack
seated vendor managing inventory near boxes

entered.detail: white dress forms displaying clothing items
metal racks with hanging jackets and shirts under fluorescent lighting
cardboard boxes and plastic bags with merchandise

segments.scene_description: The player moves directly past the clothing vendor stall, passing under the illuminated awning. Mannequins and clothing racks line the path while vendors attend to their merchandise. The environment shifts from open plaza to a semi-covered commercial space with artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow street with food vendor and gang graffiti

events.description: passes from vendor area into narrower street with Tyger Claws graffiti visible on walls

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street past the clothing vendor toward a food kiosk

notable_agents.action: food vendor working inside the illuminated kiosk

entered.detail: small illuminated booth with glass windows and neon trim
large red and white gang tags painted on the building wall
industrial HVAC equipment stacked on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Moving past the clothing vendor, the scene transitions to a narrower urban street lined with industrial equipment and gang graffiti. The player approaches a small illuminated food kiosk at the end of the path, with 'Tyger Claws' tags visible on the surrounding walls, indicating a shift to a more industrial and potentially dangerous zone.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic, neon-lit stairwell into a sprawling urban plaza before narrowing into a gritty industrial alley. It begins with an ascent up concrete steps covered in graffiti and bathed in red and purple light, passing a descending security guard before emerging into the open air. As the camera exits the stairwell, the scene expands into a vast nighttime plaza dominated by a glowing digital cherry blossom tree and towering billboards, moving through a crowd of pedestrians toward a distant vendor. The perspective then shifts from the open square to a semi-covered commercial space as the camera glides under the awning of a clothing stall lined with mannequins. Finally, the environment tightens once more, moving past the vendor into a narrow street marked by industrial equipment and Tyger Claws gang graffiti, ending at a small, illuminated food kiosk.
